rules.message: Blocked: git rebase is prohibited on shared branches. Use git fetch origin && git merge origin/main instead.
Blocked: git pull --rebase is prohibited. Use git pull (without --rebase) or git fetch origin && git merge origin/main instead.
Blocked: Force-pushing to origin/main is prohibited. Use a normal git push to a PR branch and rely on protected-branch PR merges instead.
Blocked: Force-pushing to upstream/main is prohibited. Use a normal git push to a PR branch and rely on protected-branch PR merges instead.
